voices.lens: Entrepreneur, former presidential candidate, DOGE co-lead. New right populist. Appeals to young conservatives and tech-adjacent audiences.

quotes.quote:
The first part of addressing affordability is to undo the inflation crisis created by government overgrowth under Biden, but the other half is to increase wealth—by putting more money back in Americans’ pockets.

Video

Lower property taxes, lower electric bills, lower housing costs.

Bigger paychecks, better schools, more wealth creation.

Coming soon to Ohio.

Video

We hear the grassroots across our state loud & clear: slash property taxes, fix failing schools, bring high-paying jobs to our state, and conduct economic development in a way that puts local communities first. Grateful for GOP county endorsements from Preble & Brown counties this week, joining our
How to ACTUALLY make life affordable.

voices.lens: Progressive political commentator. Data-driven, measured tone. Focuses on policy substance over culture war.

Good morning! Another beautiful day under the Affordability President™

quotes.quote:

Meanwhile:
